heading: Criminal offenses
label: 5508 Criminal offenses
notes: Effective DateSection effective 120 days after , see , set out as a note under .Nov. 3, 1995section 111 of Pub. L. 104–43section 5501 of this title

children.heading: Offenses
children.label: a Offenses
children.text: A person is guilty of an offense if the person commits any act prohibited by paragraph (6), (7), (8), or (9) of .section 5505 of this title

children.heading: Punishment
children.label: b Punishment
children.text: Any offense described in subsection (a) is a class A misdemeanor punishable by a fine under title 18, or imprisonment for not more than one year, or both; except that if in the commission of any offense the person uses a dangerous weapon, engages in conduct that causes bodily injury to any authorized officer, or places any such officer in fear of imminent bodily injury, the offense is a felony punishable by a fine under title 18, or imprisonment for not more than 10 years, or both.
